---
title: "Climate Change as a Mortality Crisis"
description: "Comparing projected climate-driven death rates with current US COVID mortality."
author: "synesis"
date: "2020-09-28"
categories: [society, links]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Climate change deaths. Image from [NYT](https://www.nytimes.com/interactive/2020/09/15/magazine/climate-crisis-migration-america.html).](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

By comparison, current US deaths by COVID is about 63/100k people.

There is also dire economic implication.

A sobering read: <https://lnkd.in/gvbGty9>


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_climatechange-activity-6716183543623618560-K2Zu).*
